Our Story

Born from a Passion
for Great Food

Columbus Cafe was founded by a passionate entrepreneur with a vision to offer warm meals and welcoming spaces. Since opening in Kakamega in 2021, we've grown into a trusted name for food lovers and travelers alike — now proudly serving Eldoret City with a full restaurant, hotel, and conference facility.

We believe in creating an atmosphere where every guest feels valued. Our commitment to fresh, locally sourced ingredients and quality service defines everything we do.

🌿
Locally Sourced
Fresh, seasonal ingredients in every dish
🌍
Global Flavours
Kenyan classics meet international cuisine
🕯️
Elegant Ambience
Moody lighting, chic decor, Instagram-worthy
📞
Pre-Order Service
Order ahead — meal ready on arrival

From Our Kitchen

Signature Dishes

Signature
The Grand Sharing Platter
A feast for the table — seasoned rice, slow-cooked beans, sweet plantain, grilled meats, sambaza and dipping sauces. A true Columbus centrepiece.
Ksh 2,200
Serves 3–4
Breakfast
Steak & Egg Breakfast
Perfectly grilled steak with golden hash brown, sunny-side eggs, roasted tomato and a vibrant medley of fresh vegetables. A hearty start to any day.
Ksh 1,450
Mains
Chef's Pick
Grilled Board & Fresh Juice
Smoked grilled meats, roasted corn, herbed chapati rolls and house dipping sauce — served on a wooden board with Columbus fresh-squeezed juice.
Ksh 1,600
Sharing Board
Popular
Pizza & Wings Night
Cheesy flatbread pizza on a wooden board alongside crispy grilled chicken wings, loaded fries and signature Columbus dipping sauce. Perfect for groups.
Ksh 1,350
Group Favourite
Light Meal
Chicken Wrap & Fries
Loaded chicken wrap stuffed with sautéed peppers, melted cheese and salsa — served alongside golden roasted potato chunks and fresh garden salad.
Ksh 950
Mains
Signature Drink
Coconut Lemonade
Columbus's signature fresh juice — a tropical blend of coconut and citrus, poured over ice and garnished with a fresh orange wheel. Refreshing and vibrant.
Ksh 320
Beverages
The Experience

An Atmosphere
Like No Other

"What an absolutely stunning restaurant. The ambience is flawless — moody lighting, chic decor, the kind of vibe that screams Instagram will love me. The food looked like edible art."

— Google Reviewer, 5 Stars
What We Offer

More Than Just a Restaurant

01
🍽️
Fine Dining Restaurant

A full à la carte menu spanning Kenyan classics and international cuisine. Open daily from 7 AM to 11 PM — breakfast through dinner, all crafted with fresh quality ingredients.

02
🏨
Hotel Accommodation

Clean, cozy, and affordable Standard and Deluxe rooms for short and extended stays. All rooms include free Wi-Fi, breakfast, fresh bedding, and modern bathrooms.

03
🎤
Conference & Events

A dedicated conference facility for corporate meetings, private celebrations, and special events. Contact us to tailor your perfect event experience.

04
🎂
Custom Cakes & Pre-Orders

Birthday cakes from Ksh 400 per slice available for pre-order. Call ahead to arrange a custom cake or pre-order your meal and have it ready on arrival.

05
🎸
Live Entertainment

Columbus Cafe hosts live band nights — the perfect setting to enjoy great music alongside your meal. Follow our social pages for upcoming event nights.

06
🌿
Dietary Preferences

We cater to all dietary needs — vegetarian, halal, and allergy-conscious options always available. Simply let your server know and we'll take care of the rest.

"Looking for a perfect reservation? This is the place. Customer service is dope and the food is awesome. You can pre-order and have your meal ready when you arrive. An iconic place in Eldoret."

"Today was my first time and the customer service — top notch. The food? Oh my days, so good. Will be coming often. Absolutely loved every bit of it."

Google Maps · 5 Stars
★★★★★

"What an absolutely stunning restaurant. Flawless ambience — moody lighting, chic decor. The food sailing past to other tables looked like edible art. Someone in the kitchen clearly cares."

★★★★☆

"Columbus Cafe oozes elegance — one of the best outlooks if not the best. The interior lighting and design are commendable. Food is tasty and sometimes finger-licking."

★★★★★

"Good vibes with delicious food and a great atmosphere. Staff are humble and polite. The kind of place you want to bring friends or clients. Will absolutely be back."

Stay With Us

Columbus Hotel

Clean, cozy, and affordable rooms for short or extended stays. Whether you're here for business or a weekend getaway, our rooms offer comfort without complication — and breakfast is always included.
